steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “though” in the final sentence (“They found, though, that...”) signals a contradiction. The passage sets up an unresolved question, presents a hypothesis, and this word indicates the finding will counter that hypothesis.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content: B correctly identifies the three-part structure: unresolved question, hypothesis, and conflicting observation. The others mischaracterize the finding as refining, confirming, or validating the hypothesis when it contradicts it. That matches choice B — B is correct.
